name: Turkey Steaks with Sausalito Salsa
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut each turkey slice into 2 pieces; cover and set aside.
2. Combine tomato, orange, chilies, onions, cilantro, gingerroot, and salt in a medium bowl; set aside.
3. Melt butter in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
4. Saute the turkey steaks, half at a time if necessary, until lightly browned on both sides, about 3 to 5 minutes.
5. Transfer the turkey steaks to a serving platter.
6. Spoon salsa on top of each steak.
7. Garnish with cilantro sprigs.
Makes 6 servings.
